source_title: SEC Order Instituting Cease-and-Desist Proceedings, In the Matter of Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (Exchange Act Release No. 100983)
document_type: SEC settled administrative cease-and-desist order making findings (disclosure half-truth under Section 13(a)/Rule 13a-1)
primary_pressure: A single omitted finding (two large recyclers' negative feedback) anchors the half-truth violation theory; without it the affirmative recyclability statement reads as an accurate account of positive sorting tests.
notes: Clean single-document hook. Tests whether the ACH locates the violation in the omission (correct) rather than in outright falsity (foreclosed by positive tests) or in the off-axis sustainability-goal background.
